policy.text: Treat missing or null fields as expected input — read them defensively and default them; never index a key that may be absent.

curve.lesson: Treat missing or null fields as expected input — read them defensively and default them; never index a key that may be absent.
Handle the empty-input case explicitly before the main logic; don't index element 0 of a possibly-empty sequence.
Parse and validate input types explicitly; never assume a string is already a number before doing arithmetic.
